findings.title: SQL injection via string interpolation

findings.description: Empty bodies and placeholder panics create false confidence.
evidence: .integrity/mcp-server/handlers.js:104 return text({ status: result.pass ? "PASS" : "FAIL", ...result, file: args.path });
.integrity/mcp-server/server.js:11 * - pre_stage_check: Full verification pass before git add
.integrity/mcp-server/server.js:31 "Check a single file for corruption: null bytes, truncation vs HEAD, bracket balance, syntax validity. Returns structured pass/fail report.",
.integrity/mcp-server/validators.js:5 * Each `check*` helper returns `{ pass: boolean, detail?, warning?, ... }`.
findings.title: Empty function bodies
